---
name: Feedback
about: Submit feedback on ARS-1 v0.2
title: "[FEEDBACK] "
labels: feedback, v0.2
assignees: ''
---

## Section / topic

Which section, field, or aspect of the standard does this feedback relate to?

(e.g. §3.2 Class I attributes, §4 ISO 20022 envelope, §8 Purpose codes, §11 Travel Rule, §13 Operator profiles)

## Feedback

Your comment, observation, or critique.

## Context

What is your role / use case? Why does this matter for your implementation, deployment, or supervision?

(Optional but helpful: are you a multilateral, central bank, operator, auditor, AI developer, regulator, standards body, etc.)

## Proposed action

What change, if any, do you propose? Leave blank if simply registering an observation.

---

*The ARS-1 v0.2 public comment period closes 31 August 2026.*
*A revised v0.3 will incorporate substantive feedback.*
